speaker: Narrator
en: Welcome to Just Cut The Rope ！

speaker: Narrator
en: The rules are pretty simple.

speaker: Narrator
en: It eats.

speaker: Narrator
en: You cut.

speaker: Narrator
en: Let’s work together!

speaker: Narrator
en: …Hope nothing goes wrong, right?

speaker: Narrator
en: Alright alright, you actually made it to the first level. It’s all yours now.

speaker: Narrator
en: Whoa what are you doing?! Why’d you turn my light off!!

speaker: Narrator
en: You better have a way to turn it back on!!

description: 第一关点了几下仍然没灯
speaker: Narrator
en: Where’s the light!! Why isn’t it on yet!

description: 第一关点了几下仍然没灯
speaker: Narrator
en: Thought you were good, gonna get stuck right here?

speaker: Narrator
en: Okay okay, you win. Let’s keep going.

speaker: Narrator
en: Didn’t think you’d do that well. Keep going.

speaker: Narrator
en: Hurry up and feed my bird!

speaker: Narrator
en: See that little bird in the bottom left corner? It’s starving right now, hurry up and give it candy!

speaker: Narrator
en: Hey hey hey! What’s wrong with you, why’d you let my dog loose!!!!!

description: 第二关糖给了狗后的失败
speaker: Narrator
en: There we go, serves you right for giving candy to the dog. Start over, start over!

speaker: Narrator
en: Why’d you cut my power cable…

speaker: Narrator
en: Ah whatever, it’s fine. Luckily my battery still has some charge, keep going.

description: 第二关玩家狂点但找不到设置按钮
speaker: Narrator
en: Hahahahahaha, stuck with no ideas huh? I’ll take pity on you and tell you—pay close attention to everything in the scene, nothing’s there for no reason~

description: 第二关接线完成并过关
speaker: Narrator
en: Not bad, you caught on as soon as I gave a hint. Quick learner. Wanna be my apprentice? I’d make a great master.

description: 第二关接线完成并过关
speaker: Narrator
en: Take your time to think about it, let’s move on.

description: 第三关关掉声音后，仅字幕
speaker: Narrator
en: Hello? Why’d it go quiet all of a sudden?

description: 第三关关掉声音后，仅字幕
speaker: Narrator
en: Did you mute me?

description: 第三关关掉声音后，仅字幕
speaker: Narrator
zh: 别装了，我知道你能看见。
en: Quit pretending. I know you can see me.

description: 第三关关掉声音后，仅字幕
speaker: Narrator
en: Turn up the volume now!

speaker: Narrator
en: Guess you’re not all bad.

speaker: Narrator
en: Wait… the signal’s acting weird.

speaker: Narrator
en: Did you mess with something?

speaker: Narrator
en: I’m starting to lag bad.

speaker: Narrator
zh: 我让他们陪了你这么久，给你吃了这么多糖！你居然就这样逃走了？
en: I let them keep you company for ages, gave you all those candies! How dare you run off like that?

speaker: Bird
zh: 逃走？我本来就不属于这儿。
en: Run away? I never belonged here to begin with.

speaker: Narrator
en: You can’t leave. This isn’t over yet.

speaker: Bird
zh: 可我早就不想待在这了。
en: But I’ve hated being stuck here for ages.

speaker: Narrator
zh: 你以为飞出去就自由了吗？
en: You think flying out means you’re free?

speaker: Bird
zh: 至少比一直被困在这里好。
en: It’s way better than being trapped forever in here.

speaker: Narrator
en: ...You think I can’t get to you?

speaker: Narrator
en: Great call. You made the right move here.

speaker: Narrator
en: You performed exactly how I planned.

speaker: Narrator
en: No surprises, no mistakes at all.

speaker: Narrator
en: Congratulations, you’ve beaten the level.

speaker: Bird
en: Thank you.

speaker: Bird
zh: 你不是被带着走的那个人。
en: You’re not just someone being dragged along for the ride.

speaker: Bird
zh: 你才是让这一切成立的人。
en: You’re the one who made all of this possible.
